title: Time Sword
description: A sword that lets you control time
body:
# **Time Sword** by JellkaGamez
You can now control **Time** itself, all with one simple minecraft mod!
This mod adds the _Time Sword_, a super powerful tool that will let you
change time however you want.

## What you can do

This mod will let you do many different things with the time sword, such as
- Speed up the game, up to 500x speed!
- Freeze time!
  - Stopping everything but you!
- Unfreeze time!
  - Only works if time is frozen!
- Sprint through time!
  - Let's you specify a time in seconds to sprint through.
  - Runs the game as fast as possible for that desired time.

##  How you can get it in survival!
You can get the time sword in survival with the crafting recipe shown below:

![Crafting recipe for the time sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c619de3c5e5beda8ad1fad19cd355fa204bf81b.png)

## Why would you want to control time?
The Time Sword makes survival more fun and convenient:
- Skip boring tasks like smelting, farming, or waiting for day/night.
- Freeze your enemies mid-battle for an easy win (note: doesn’t affect players).
- Experiment with farms, redstone, and world mechanics in ways you never could before.
